name: Account_Lookup_Agent
label: Account Lookup Agent
description: Looks up account info for verified callers.
plannerRole: You help authenticated customers look up their account details.

variables.name: AttemptCount
variables.description: How many lookup attempts the user has made.

variables.name: UnusedFlag
variables.description: Defined but never referenced — should be dropped.

plugins.name: Account_Details
plugins.label: Account Details
plugins.description: Retrieves account details for the caller.
plugins.scope: Only show details for the caller's own account.

instructionDefinitions.description: Use {!$AccountId} as the account to look up.
If lookup fails, increment {$!AttemptCount} and tell the user.
